properties.description: API key creation, validation, and revocation for project and account access
Automated provisioning of projects and resources on org creation
Full project data backup, export, and restore
Isolated graph branch management — create, merge, delete branches
Conversational chat sessions with message history and streaming responses
Document chunking logic — splits documents into indexable text segments
Storage, retrieval, and deletion of text chunks with embedding vectors
Background jobs for discovering and indexing new content from data sources
Internal platform documentation management and serving
File upload, storage, metadata management, and content extraction for documents
Rules controlling how graph objects and documents are vectorized for search
Internal pub/sub event bus — broadcasts entity changes to SSE clients in real time
GitHub App integration — OAuth, webhooks, repo access tokens
Core knowledge graph CRUD — objects, relationships, versioning, validation, migration
Health check endpoints and Prometheus metrics exposition
Org and project invitation flows — create, accept, revoke invites
Append-only audit log of all graph mutations with manual note support
Model Context Protocol server — exposes graph tools to MCP-compatible AI clients
Registry of external MCP servers with tool discovery, sync, and proxy
User-facing notification system — creation, listing, mark-as-read
Multi-tenant organization management — CRUD, memberships, tool settings
Project-level grouping of graph data — CRUD, memberships, settings
LLM provider abstraction — OpenAI, Anthropic, Google; model catalog and pricing sync
Secure code execution environments using gVisor and Firecracker microVMs
OCI container image management for agent sandbox environments
Dynamic graph schema definitions, type migrations, and compiled type resolution
Unified vector and hybrid search across graph objects, documents, and chunks
Generic background task tracking — status, progress, cancellation
RBAC and permission checks — org/project role enforcement
Tracking recent user interactions for activity feeds and suggestions
User settings, display name, avatar, and preferences
Core user identity management — lookup, creation, Zitadel sync
